dynamodb.table.timetolivespecification.C: Represents the settings used to enable or disable Time to Live (TTL) for the specified table.

dynamodb.table.timetolivespecification.A.Description: The name of the TTL attribute used to store the expiration time for items in the table.  + The `AttributeName` property is required when enabling the TTL, or when TTL is already enabled.+ To update this property, you must first disable TTL and then enable TTL with the new attribute name.

dynamodb.table.timetolivespecification.E.Description: Indicates whether TTL is to be enabled (true) or disabled (false) on the table.
